sections.paragraph:
ἐξασθενέω fut. ἐξασθενήσω; aor. 3 pl. ἐξησθένησαν Ps 63:9; pf. ptc. ἐξησθενηκότας (PsSol 17:31) (s. ἀσθενέω; Hippocr. et al.; Plut.; Aelian, NA 16, 27; Vett. Val. 125, 11; 139, 29; BGU 903, 15; PTebt 50, 33) in our lit. only fig. (cp. Diod S 20, 78, 1 τοῖς λογισμοῖς; Philo; Agatharchides: 86 Fgm. 20 [in Jos., C. Ap. 1, 211] Jac.) become quite weak ἐν τῇ ἀγάπῃ IPhld 6:2 (for the constr. w. ἐν cp. Vett. Val. 59, 13).—DELG s.v. σθένος.

fut. fut. = fut.

aor. aor. = aorist

  1. pl. = plural
  2. pf. = perfect

ptc. ptc. = participle

PsSol PsSol = Psalms of Solomon—List 2

Hippocr Hippocr = Corpus Hippocraticum, V–IV b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

Aelian Aelian , II a.d.—List 5

BGU BGU = Aegyptische Urkunden aus den Museen zu Berlin: Griechische Urkunden—List 4

PTebt PTebt = The Tebtunis Papyri—List 4

lit. lit. = literal(ly); literature (refererences to [scholarly] literature)

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

Diod S Diod S , I b.c.—List 5

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

Agatharchides Agatharchides , of Cnidus, II b.c.—List 5

Fgm. Fgm. = fragment, fragmentary

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

Jac. Jac. = Die Fragmente der griechischen Historiker, ed. FJacoby—Lists 5, 6

IPhld IPhld = Ignatius to the Philadelphians—List 1

constr. constr. = construction

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 346
